team_name: ProcureCheck — AI-Assisted Tender Eligibility Evaluation for Government Procurement
summary: Design a technical platform that can understand tenders, understand each bidder, evaluate eligibility, and produce explainable evaluation reports for government procurement officers.
optimization_claims: Evaluation time drops from 15 days to 2.
Every rejection becomes documentable and defensible.
constraints_addressed: Ambiguous mandatory/optional conditions in the tender
Contradictions within a single bidder's submission
